ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rental_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the rental station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the rental station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the rental station (total number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the rental station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the rental station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the rental station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes available */,
  "available_bike_stands" INTEGER /* Number of bike stands available */,
  "rented_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently rented */,
  "bikes_under_maintenance" INTEGER /* Number of bikes under maintenance */,
  "time_of_day" INTEGER /* Time of day (in minutes) */,
  "iso_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data point (HH:MM:SS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_availability_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "vapour_pressure" REAL /* Vapour pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "rain" REAL /* Rainfall in mm */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Sunshine in hours */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_data" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date and time of rental */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time of return */,
  "rental_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the rental */,
  "return_location" TEXT /* Location of return (in case it's different from the rental location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_status" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "bike_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history of the bike */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike (in case it's not at a rental station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity (e.g., bike ID, rental station ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_station_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "average_bike_availability" REAL /* Average bike availability */,
  "average_rental_duration" TEXT /* Average rental duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_station_stats_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_condition_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "vapour_pressure" REAL /* Vapour pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "rain" REAL /* Rainfall in mm */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Sunshine in hours */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_condition_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)
